name: Cybernaut International Holdings Company Limited
summary: Cybernaut International Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells paper converting equipment and other relating equipment in the People's Republic of China, Europe, North America, Hong Kong, and the rest of Asia. The company provides money lending and Internet education services; and e-commerce solutions and related support services. In addition, it is involved in the sale of information technology products. The company was formerly known as Sinoref Holdings Limited and changed its name to Cybernaut International Holdings Company Limited in May 2017. Cybernaut International Holdings Company Limited was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Wanchai, the People's Republic of China.
